rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.04893, which governs bilingual teacher certification test retake rules. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board shall propose rules to allow a person seeking certification under this subchapter who fails to perform satisfactorily on the Bilingual Target Language Proficiency Test
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely different policy areas (property tax vs. educator certification).
